Content-Type: application/json

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"engineerType":"BACKEND"},"path":["employees",0,"role"]},{"data":{"engineerType":"FULLSTACK"},"path":["employees",1,"role"]},{"data":{"engineerType":"BACKEND"},"path":["employees",4,"role"]},{"data":{"engineerType":"FULLSTACK"},"path":["employees",5,"role"]},{"data":{"engineerType":"FULLSTACK"},"path":["employees",6,"role"]},{"data":{"engineerType":"FRONTEND"},"path":["employees",7,"role"]},{"data":{"engineerType":"FULLSTACK"},"path":["employees",9,"role"]}],"hasNext":false}

--graphql
